name: Bega Cheese Limited
analysis: BGA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.6900, stop A$5.2569, target A$6.2700 (1.34:1) — then trail it.
